title: 10 Questions Every Man of God Needs to Ask Himself
caption:
Ten questions a man of God needs to sit with. Most men never do. That's why they stay in the same patterns year after year.

Is your private life what you say it is? What are you actually feeding? Who can really call you out? Are you pursuing God or just self-improvement? What sin are you still managing instead of killing?

The man who examines himself is the man who doesn't get surprised by himself.

"Let a person examine himself." — 1 Corinthians 11:28

Sit with one of these today. One is enough to start.

Save this and share it with one man who needs the conversation.

#faith #christianmen #thework #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #selfexamination #christianity #scripture
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
